_comment: Register eds-mcp as the toolset for the Regulated-Finance Design-System Engineer (or any Agency specialist). Works with no npm publish via npx github:Edwson/eds-mcp. Drop the relevant block into your MCP client config (e.g. claude_desktop_config.json).

_alternativeHttp._comment: Prefer plain HTTP? Run the zero-dependency API instead and point any client at it.
